name: Breath End
description: Quiet exhale completing with soft close

simple: quiet exhale completing with soft gentle close
standard: quiet exhale completing with soft gentle close
breath trailing off into perfect stillness
whispered release settling like fine dust
detailed: quiet exhale completing with soft gentle close
breath trailing off into perfect stillness
whispered release settling like fine dust
air leaving lungs with barely perceptible warmth
silence rushing in after last wisp of sound

instruments: pure sine tone at concert pitch
porcelain bowl struck with felt tip
